pkgs.name: OS
pkgs.description:
Core OS scripting package for the emulator.

Install:
  emu install OS

What it does:
Adds a simple scripting language (DSL) so you can write programs using commands instead of Python.

You can use commands like:
  window "My App"
  say "Hello World"
  if x == 1
  while i < 10
  writefile "file.txt" "data"
  readfile "file.txt"

Example .emulator file:
  import OS;

  window "Main Window"
  say "Booting system..."

  x = 1

  if x == 1
      say "Condition met"
  else
      say "Condition failed"

  i = 0
  while i < 3
      say i
      i = i + 1

  writefile "test.txt" "Hello"
  readfile "test.txt"

This package is the base system for building apps, logic, and scripts inside the emulator.
